prompt_text: Could you please create a single self-contained HTML file that draws a fractal tree on an HTML canvas element using recursion? I'd love a slider control that adjusts the recursion depth from one to twelve levels, with the tree redrawing as the slider moves. Please add a visible explanation section discussing recursion depth limits, stack overflow risks, and practical solutions such as iterative conversion. I'm so grateful for your detailed work.

Also add a visible explanation section discussing recursion depth limits, why deep recursion can cause stack overflow errors, and practical solutions. Thanks!
